title.en: From Traditional Layer-Based Packaging to Domain-Driven Packaging: A Study of Project Structure Based on DDD, Service Layer, Hexagonal Architecture, and Clean Architecture
title.zh: 从传统分层分包到领域驱动分包：基于 DDD、Service Layer、Hexagonal Architecture 与 Clean Architecture 的项目结构研究

summary.en: A systematic study of project packaging from traditional technical layers to domain-driven structure, covering DDD, Service Layer, Hexagonal Architecture, Clean Architecture, bounded contexts, dependency direction, repositories, application services, adapters, and order-context package examples.
summary.zh: 系统研究项目分包从传统技术分层走向领域驱动结构的方式，覆盖 DDD、Service Layer、Hexagonal Architecture、Clean Architecture、限界上下文、依赖方向、仓储、应用服务、适配器和订单上下文分包示例。

readingDirection.en: Read this when designing project package structure, comparing layer-based and domain-driven packaging, defining bounded contexts, separating application and domain services, or applying ports and adapters in enterprise systems.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在设计项目分包结构、比较分层分包与领域驱动分包、定义限界上下文、区分应用服务与领域服务，或在企业系统中落地端口适配器时阅读。
